flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Virginia Western Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Virginia Western Community College rose 10% between 2006 and 2009 (14.1% → 15.5%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Virginia Western Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5k → 3.9k).
